projectName: Zustand Persist Code And Test Validation

quick: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8')); if(!pkg.scripts || !pkg.scripts['test:spec'] || !pkg.scripts['test:types']) throw new Error('missing test scripts'); if(pkg.packageManager !== 'pnpm@10.18.3') throw new Error('unexpected package manager');"

node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const source=fs.readFileSync('src/middleware/persist.ts','utf8'); if(!source.includes('hydrationVersion')) throw new Error('missing hydrationVersion guard'); if(!source.includes('onRehydrateStorage')) throw new Error('missing onRehydrateStorage contract');"
full: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const testFile=fs.readFileSync('tests/persistAsync.test.tsx','utf8'); if(!testFile.includes('persist middleware with async configuration')) throw new Error('missing async persist suite'); if(!testFile.includes('can persist state')) throw new Error('missing persist-state test'); if(!testFile.includes('createJSONStorage')) throw new Error('missing createJSONStorage usage');"
